title: Weather - Weekend Plans
description: Listen, then prove you were listening

_voiceScript.script:
Anna: Peter, aké je dnes počasie?
Peter: Je slnečno, ale je veterno.
Anna: A cez víkend?
Peter: Cez víkend bude búrka. V sobotu bude pršať.
Anna: Naozaj? Chcela som ísť s deťmi do parku.
Peter: Radšej nie. V nedeľu bude zamračené. Asi pätnásť stupňov.
Anna: Je to teplo alebo chladno?
Peter: Chladno. Vezmi deťom bundy.
Anna: A budúci týždeň?
Peter: Bude krajšie. Bude slnečno a teplo.
Anna: Super! Pôjdeme do parku budúci týždeň.
Peter: Áno. Deti budú šťastné!

exercises.instruction: Tap every word or expression you heard in the conversation.

questions.questionEn: Anna asks about the weather. How does Peter describe today?
questions.answerMeaning: Je slnečno = It's sunny. Je veterno = It's windy. Peter describes today as sunny but windy.

questions.questionEn: Peter says 'Cez víkend bude búrka.' What does búrka mean?
questions.answerMeaning: Búrka = storm. Cez víkend = on the weekend. Peter warns there will be a storm on the weekend.

questions.questionEn: Peter tells Anna not to go to the park. What does he say about Saturday?
questions.answerMeaning: V sobotu bude pršať = On Saturday it will rain. V sobotu = on Saturday, bude pršať = it will rain.

questions.questionEn: Peter says it will be 'Asi pätnásť stupňov' on Sunday. What does this mean?
questions.answerMeaning: Pätnásť stupňov = fifteen degrees. Asi = about / approximately. So: about fifteen degrees.

questions.questionEn: Anna asks 'Je to teplo alebo chladno?' What is Peter's one-word answer?
questions.answerMeaning: Chladno = cold. Teplo = warm. Peter answers with one word — Chladno — telling Anna it will be cold.

questions.questionEn: Anna asks about next week. What does Peter say the weather will be like?

answers.textEn: It will rain and be windy
It will be sunny and warm
It will be stormy and cold

questions.answerMeaning: Bude slnečno a teplo = It will be sunny and warm. Peter also says Bude krajšie = It will be nicer.

reviewPair.english: It will be sunny and warm.

sentences.promptEn: On Sunday it will be cloudy.
We'll go to the park next week.
